arts.ttl: Fulham star admits he was “looking forward” to exit – Leaving door open for January and summer
arts.sum: Fulham midfielder Andreas Pereira has revealed he was “looking forward” to joining Marseille in the summer and is keeping the door open to the French side. Premier League Brasil have an interview with the 28-year-old Fulham midfielder today, in which he reveals Nottingham Forest were also interested in him.
